mapper.insert: INSERT INTO patient_message(user_id, type, title, content, ref_id, is_read, create_time) VALUES(#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{refId}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, type, title, content, ref_id AS refId, is_read AS isRead, DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS createTime FROM patient_message WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{length} OFFSET #{start}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM patient_message WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE patient_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
